title: Selenite
description: This project is a new endeavor focused on creating an action / exploration experience within Minecraft. It leverages the capabilities of Selenium to optimize performance and showcase the potential for modded content within.
body:
## Action / Exploration
This project is a new endeavor focused on creating an action / exploration experience within Minecraft. It leverages the capabilities of [Selenium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/selenium) to **optimize performance** and **showcase the potential** for modded content within:

> **Adventure:** The modpack introduces new challenges, objectives, and storytelling to keep players engaged and provide a sense of purpose during exploration.

> **Immersion:** [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) increased render distance enhances the game's realism and atmosphere, drawing players deeper into the world.

> **Activities:** The collection expands the range of available activities, offering players more diverse and engaging ways to interact with the environment.

> We aim to create a more **compelling Minecraft experience**, fostering a **stronger sense of adventure** and **discovery** for players.

You may freely incorporate this content within your modpacks, ensuring to **cite the respective creators** and provide appropriate attribution links.
